transcript: Speaker A: Interview mein 'MySelf Karthik' bolke intro de sakta hoon kya? [Can I introduce myself in an interview by saying 'MySelf Karthik'?] Speaker B: Nahi Karthik, 'MySelf' se shuru karna galat hai. 'I am Karthik' ya 'My name is Karthik' bolo. Wahi sahi lagega. [No Karthik, starting with 'MySelf' is wrong. Say 'I am Karthik' or 'My name is Karthik'. That will sound right.] Speaker A: Okay okay. Mujhe English acche se bolna nahi aata. [Okay okay. I don't know how to speak English well.] Speaker B: Daro mat. Mere saath roz 15 minute baat karo, phir dekhna tum acche English mein kaise bolte ho. [Don't worry. Talk to me for 15 minutes daily, then see how well you speak English.] Speaker A: Fees zyada to nahi hoga? [The fees won't be too high, right?] Speaker B: Sirf ek rupaye mein MySivi app try kar sakte ho. Ek crore se zyada log mere saath seekh rahe hain. [You can try the MySivi app for just one rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning with me.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: A man on a beach gets grammar corrections from an AI robot. The robot introduces MySivi, an AI English learning app, offering daily practice. The ad promotes a 3-day premium trial for ₹1 and prompts users to install the app.
